message.title: Contact Message
message.description: Standard schema for visitor submissions containing contact details and structured inquiry content.

name.description: The full name of the sender.

email.description: Verification return route for replying to the inquiry.

message.description: Body description matching the question or discussion.

createdAt.description: The precise Firestore server timestamp at database transaction point.

messages/{messageId}.description: Database container storing submitted portfolio contact form rows with write-only rules for safety.
